full_text:
Wang Ling (Yanyun) 王淩 (彥云)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Ling (王淩), styledYanyun (彥云). Plotted against Sima Yi but plan was leaked and he was forced into suicide. Wang Ling was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Ling lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
